title: Remote Access and Network Management Paths · Operations Brief: Net Management Methods
summary: Provide secure operator, vendor, and user connectivity with recoverable in-band and out-of-band paths. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net management methods increment in a least-privilege management access plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose SSH, GUI, API, or console management with encrypted transport, identity, least privilege, and logging.
Choose split or full tunnel by traffic path, inspection, performance, privacy, DNS, and local-network risk.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook

# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
